description_subtype_global: A synchronous index is updated simultaneously with the indexed table and provides strict consistency.
description_subtype_global-async: An asynchronous index receives table changes in the background and provides eventual consistency.
description_subtype_global-unique: A unique secondary index enforces uniqueness for the indexed columns and is updated synchronously.
description_subtype_fulltext: A full-text index enables text search by words, phrases, and, with n-grams, substrings.
description_subtype_fulltext-plain: A plain full-text index stores only the inverted index and supports filtering without relevance ranking.
description_subtype_fulltext-relevance: A relevance full-text index stores term frequency statistics required for relevance ranking.
description_subtype_vector: A vector index enables vector search using distance or similarity functions.
